catalog_content:
Item Name: Peet's Coffee, Dark Roast Whole Bean Coffee - Espresso Forte 32 Ounce Bag
Bullet Point 1: Contains one (1) 32 Ounce Bag of Peet's Espresso Forte Dark Espresso Roast Whole Bean 100% Arabica Coffee
Bullet Point 2: Flavor and Roast: Dark Roast. Chocolate, hazelnut, smooth crema. While many of our coffees make an excellent espresso, we crafted this blend specifically to have stout body, rich flavor, and perfect crema
Bullet Point 3: Brewing Methods: Use fine ground coffee for espresso at home. Coarsely ground coffee (consistency of coarse sea salt) can be used to make cold brew or a French press. Use a medium grind (consistency of sand) for drip or a pour over in your Chemex
Bullet Point 4: Sourcing With Impact: The coffee you buy can impact the welfare of the people and planet. Peet’s is actively engaged in driving positive impact in communities where our coffees are grown.
Bullet Point 5: Rich. Complex. Incomparable. Masters of our craft for over 50 years, we hand roast the very best coffees in the world.

overall_summary: Premium specialty coffee brand with a strong reputation for quality, hand-roasted for over 50 years. The Espresso Forte variant is specifically crafted for bold espresso with rich flavor and crema, justifying a higher price point in the mid-to-premium coffee segment. The 32-ounce bag offers a substantial quantity for frequent espresso drinkers, while the packaging design and brand heritage enhance its premium positioning.
